title: Folder API Endpoint

posts.author: brandon1 (Brandon Sprecher)
posts.cookedHtml: I am working on developing an Item View Application that allows you to create Folder / Board Templates from Item / Pulse Data. As of right now their is no API endpoint for creating and editing Folders. I feel that this would be a very simple feature to implement, and would allow users / developers so much for flexibility when it comes to automating workflows and staying organized. Would love to hear if anybody has any updates regarding when this might be available.

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @brandon1,

Thanks for bringing this to our attention. While we don’t have an estimate for when a folder API would become available, we do appreciate your feedback and will be sure to announce it!
